name: Canadian Bacon & Cheddar Puff
recipeIngredient: 1 large Granny Smith apple, peeled, cored and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the Dijon mustard, honey, and caraway seeds. Spread one tablespoon of this mixture on each muffin half.
2. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Sauté the Canadian bacon slices until thoroughly heated, turning once. Remove with a slotted spoon.
3. Sauté the apple slices lightly in the drippings from the bacon.
4. Arrange the cooked bacon and apple slices on the muffin halves.
5. In a large bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold in the cheddar cheese, paprika, salt, and pepper.
6. Mound the cheese mixture evenly over the toppings on the muffins.
7. Place the muffins on a baking sheet. Broil in a preheated oven until puffed and golden, about 1 minute.
8. Garnish with parsley sprigs and additional apple slices. Serve.
